title: Brussels demands ‘reciprocity’ after Beijing’s ‘Made in Europe’ criticism
summary_full: “We are one of the most open markets in the world," said a European Commission spokesperson. "We also expect that openness to be mutual."
summary_public: “We are one of the most open markets in the world," said a European Commission spokesperson. "We also expect that openness to be mutual."
